历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science) was approximately 40718 → 15627 → 15256 → 26398 → 17151. In 2021, due to batch differences in the old college entrance examination, the ranking was higher; from 2022 to 2023, it stabilized around 15,000; in 2024, the first year of the new college entrance examination, there was significant fluctuation due to detailed major group segmentation (26398); in 2025, it rebounded to 17151, showing a forward trend in the past two years. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 36 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 50 in 2024, and 56 in 2025, increasing year by year. The 2026 plan is 60, an increase of 4 students (+7.1%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that alleviates competition but is insufficient to fully offset the growth in examinees.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking approximately 76th (2021: 69 → 2022: 77 → 2023: 76 → 2024: 77 → 2025: 76 → 2026: 76), stable at an upper-middle level in recent years. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management incidents, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin comprehensive popularity not in the top 100, short video platform exposure average, application attention stable. Safety Science and Engineering A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, with distinctive mining and safety characteristics. Among enrollment majors, Safety Science and Engineering, Surveying and Mapping, and Civil Engineering directly correspond to advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication and other majors are highly popular and recommended; the corresponding admission rankings for these majors at this university are high. Civil Engineering and Architecture popularity is divided and wait-and-see; Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials majors are clearly discouraged. The total number of Guangxi college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is approximately 392,000, an increase of about 12,000 from 2025 (approximately 380,000). The estimated increase in Physics Category examinees is about 8,500 (+3.3%), intensifying competition, with difficulty stable. The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, attracting Guangxi candidates across provinces. The university's Physics Category enrollment plan in Guangxi accounts for about 2–3% of the national total, at a medium-low level, not a major source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 17151, the 2026 expansion of 4 students (+7.1%) increases the ranking number, the increase of about 3.3% in Guangxi Physics Category examinees intensifies competition, the school level is stable with neutral reputation, and advantageous disciplines attract candidates in mining and safety directions, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the examinee growth effect, but after offsetting, the ranking will still shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking is approximately 17936, with a range of 17436–18436.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 17936, range 17436–18436. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (17436) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors (Electrical, Computer, AI); candidates in the middle of the range should target Tier 2 advantageous discipline majors (Safety Science and Engineering A+, Surveying A-, Mathematics) as the main direction, while also considering Tier 1 as a safety; candidates near the upper limit of the range (18436) should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, among which Civil Engineering (A-) and Business Administration (including Big Data Management and Application) offer high cost-performance and can be a stable choice.
